home.about_heading: Discover the enchanting Hotel Adria Ski.
home.about_p1: Hotel Adria Ski has a capacity of 256 beds. All rooms are equipped with a telephone and TV with digital satellite system. Each room has a private bathroom. The hotel features a small Olympic pool (25m x 8m) within the wellness center where you can relax after a day of skiing, as well as two saunas and a gym, plus massage services.
home.about_p2: Within the ski center there is a separate building for ski equipment rental and two ski schools. For professionals and beginners alike, ski slopes are accessible via a two-seat chairlift, four-seat chairlift, baby lift and drag lifts. As a new addition, Motel "Tikvice" is located at the top of the ski slopes. The hotel includes a restaurant offering traditional authentic dishes and a la carte meals.
home.feature_slopes_desc: 13 km of groomed slopes with 5 ski lifts for all skill levels
home.feature_hiking_desc: Numerous walking and hiking trails in beautiful nature
home.feature_hotel_desc: 256 beds with wellness center, pool and restaurant
home.cta_subtitle: Book your stay and secure the best prices for an unforgettable holiday in Kupres

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are available 24/7
contact.form_description: If you have any questions or would like to learn more

ski.title: Kupres Ski Resort
ski.subtitle: Ski Slopes
ski.hero_desc: Over 13 kilometers of slopes with 5 ski lifts
ski.slopes_desc: For the 2023/2024 season we are adding 2 new ski lifts. These are DRAG LIFT/ANCHOR lifts approximately 1150 meters long. Skiers can enjoy over 13 kilometers of excellently prepared ski slopes with 5 ski lifts daily from 9:00-16:00. It is important to note that all slopes are interconnected and just a few dozen meters from the lifts and hotel complex. The slopes are diverse so that both beginners and experienced skiers can find what suits them best. Friendly staff on the ground will be at your service at all times, whether for help entering the ski lift or additional explanations about the ski slopes.
ski.snow_desc: A four-seat chairlift 1850 meters long, one two-seat chairlift 980 meters long, two "anchor" drag lifts 1080 and 1150 meters long, and one baby lift 300 meters long. Snow cannons, for which additional artificial lakes have been built, enable artificial snow making to prevent lack of snow or water.
ski.cta_subtitle: Check ski pass prices and book your stay

hotel.title: Hotel Adria Ski
hotel.subtitle: Premium Accommodation
hotel.hero_desc: 256 beds, wellness, pool, restaurant - all in one place
hotel.view_desc: Hotel Adria Ski has a capacity of 256 beds. All rooms are equipped with a telephone and TV with digital satellite system. Each room has a private bathroom. The hotel features a small Olympic pool (25m x 8m) which in winter offers a unique view of the snow-covered pine forest. Adjacent to the pool are two saunas, massage services and a large fitness center where about 30 people can exercise simultaneously. The center is equipped with exercise and stretching equipment for all body parts, with at least three identical machines for each exercise, enabling quick alternating workouts for larger organized groups and teams.
hotel.comfort_p1: The hotel includes a restaurant offering traditional authentic dishes and a la carte meals. Dishes are prepared by top chefs with a rich selection of foreign and domestic wines. Next to the restaurant is a cafe bar where you can read the daily press over your morning coffee.
hotel.comfort_p2: Just below the end of the ski slopes is the Ognjišta restaurant, which offers ready-made meals for a quick refreshment in a mountain setting, allowing you to continue skiing without entering the hotel. Right across from the "Ognjišta" restaurant is a separate building where you can rent complete ski equipment, as well as two ski schools where professionally trained instructors hold skiing lessons for all interested.
hotel.quick_tikvice_desc: At the top of the slopes, 1,560m altitude
hotel.quick_ski_desc: Over 13 km of slopes with 5 ski lifts
hotel.cta_subtitle: Contact us for reservations and special offers

events.title: News
events.subtitle: Events
events.cta_subtitle: Contact us for information about upcoming events

pricing.title: Prices
pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.board_services: Board services - Prices per person (multi-bed room with TV, phone, bathroom)
pricing.included_note: Included: sauna, pool, gym, table tennis
pricing.half_board_periods: Half board (5-7 days, double room per person)
pricing.nye_note: New Year's surcharge with gala dinner: 120.00 KM (61.85 EUR) adults; children 6-14 years 40% discount
pricing.cta_subtitle: Contact us for special offers and group discounts

pool.title: Wellness
pool.subtitle: Pool
pool.hero_desc: Olympic pool 25m x 8m within the wellness center
pool.heading: Pool 25m x 8m
pool.desc_p1: Pool water for bathing requires full functionality and reliability of all mechanical systems, all electrical systems and all measurement and regulation systems. Adria Ski provides pool users with showers and foot baths, including hygiene before entering the pool area. All users entering the pool must shower and disinfect their feet in the sanitary passage.
pool.desc_p2: All installed equipment under normal conditions of use maintains the physical, chemical and microbiological properties of pool water within prescribed health safety values according to the analytical requirements of the Public Health Institute. Continuous measurements of temperature, free chlorine, redox potential and pH values of pool water are carried out, and automatic dosing devices continuously correct all values within set parameters. Pool technology flushes sand filters every forty-eight hours of continuous operation.
pool.desc_p3: After an active day of skiing, relaxation and swimming in the pool within the wellness center of Hotel "Adria Ski" will be very welcome.
pool.cta_subtitle: Book your stay and enjoy the wellness center

tikvice.title: Motel Tikvice
tikvice.hero_desc: At the top of the ski slopes, 1,560m altitude
tikvice.desc_p1: Dear guests, the staff of Hotel Adria Ski continue their tradition of improving services, presenting MOTEL TIKVICE, located at 1560 meters altitude (at the top of the slopes), with a restaurant, 4 apartments with kitchen, 1 triple room and 2 double rooms. Besides the mountain-style restaurant where you can enjoy homemade food and drinks, from the terrace in front of the motel surrounded by pine forest, you can enjoy the sunshine and the view of the beautiful Kupres field.
tikvice.desc_p2: Since the motel is located right next to the ski slopes leading to the base of Hotel "Adria Ski", you can combine skiing with lunch at the motel without losing time and enjoy an excellent cup of homemade mulled wine.
tikvice.feature_restaurant_desc: Homemade food in a mountain setting
tikvice.feature_terrace_desc: View of Kupres field from the pine forest
tikvice.feature_slopes_desc: Ski slopes right next to the motel
tikvice.cta_subtitle: Enjoy the mountains, snow and homemade food at the top of the ski slopes

ognjista.title: Restaurant Ognjišta
ognjista.hero_desc: Traditional homemade cuisine in a mountain setting
ognjista.section1_desc: Below the end of the ski slopes is the Ognjišta restaurant, which offers ready-made meals for a quick refreshment in a mountain setting, allowing you to continue skiing without entering the hotel.
ognjista.section2_desc: With the large open fireplace that creates a true winter atmosphere, you can enjoy a variety of homemade dishes, and a good cup of homemade mulled wine will provide additional warmth.
ognjista.card_ski_desc: Direct slope access from the restaurant
ognjista.cta_subtitle: Enjoy homemade food by the open fireplace with a view of the ski slopes

gastro.title: Gastro Offer
gastro.hero_desc: Traditional Kupres cuisine and homemade specialties
breakfast_items: homemade flatbread, homemade bread and fritters
homemade cured meat: prosciutto, bacon, sausage and cracklings (cracklings fried with onion)
homemade lard with paprika and bacon on bread
homemade kajmak, yogurt (homemade sour milk), homemade young squeaky cheese, homemade young or hard Kupres cheese and homemade fresh butter
lunch_dinner_items: homemade gibanica (egg pie) sarma (sauerkraut, minced meat with dried homemade bacon)
sauerkraut with dried meat of choice (knuckles, ribs and sausages, dried mutton or lamb)
chicken Kupres-style with boiled barley (wheat with butter)
moussaka with potatoes (famous Kupres potatoes and minced meat)
pies_items: spinach pie, cheese pie and burek (minced meat)
potato pie and boiled potato pie
sauerkraut pie with boiled cured meat
leso_items: baked potatoes (pole) with Kupres sheep cheese, homemade bacon and red onion
PODKRIŽA: potatoes sliced with imperial meat
POPARA: old bread in seasoned water with butter
gastro.specialties_text: We invite you to taste our specialties based on traditional folk dishes prepared with modern technologies in accordance with HACCP. The essential Kupres prosciutto and cheese as the start of every good meal and the baked "Kupres Platter" as its highlight are just part of our offer for which we are recognized.
gastro.alacarte_desc: The hotel restaurant provides breakfast and dinner services for hotel guests as well as an all-day a la carte offer. In addition to quality and delicious food, a rich wine list is available to satisfy even the most demanding wine lovers. We specialize in all types of catering and organization of large events.
gastro.special_events_intro: For special occasions in your life we offer organization of celebrations:

wedding.title: Wedding Hall
wedding.desc_p1: Every wedding is a story of its own, and that is how we approach every wedding. Take a look at some recommended menus. To provide our newlyweds with complete service, for them and their guests there is the superbly equipped restaurant of Hotel Adria Ski. If you want your wedding or another special occasion to remain in unforgettable memory, contact us with confidence.
wedding.desc_p2: This beautifully decorated wedding hall is a place where many young married couples have danced their first dance together and happily started their new life.
wedding.desc_p3: We hope that the photos you can see on our wedding hall page will best convey what you can expect when you come to the hall where you will experience an unforgettable and "craziest" night of your life.
wedding.desc_note: Dear newlyweds, from the menus offered above you are free to create your own personal menu and combine the offered dishes as suits you and your taste.
wedding.cta_subtitle: Contact us and together we'll design the perfect celebration

fitness_page.title: Fitness
fitness_page.hero_desc: Modern equipped gym for fun and recreation
fitness_page.desc_p1: In the large and modern fitness hall you can have fun and recreate with group training sessions. The fitness center is equipped with the most modern machines, which individually or in combination offer the possibility of shaping every part of the body and reaching every sports-competitive goal.
fitness_page.desc_p2: "Adria Ski" is committed to its clients in all activities. From entering our premises and the elementary instructions we give to beginners, to creating specific training programs tailored to the wishes and abilities of each member and visitor.
fitness_page.cta_subtitle: Book your stay and use the fitness center for free

ski_school.title: Ski and Snowboard School
ski_school.hero_desc: Qualified instructors for all ages and levels
ski_school.team_desc: In our special offer is the "Adria Ski" ski school. The school employs qualified ski instructors who will introduce you to all the secrets of skiing. The school also includes a "ski kindergarten", an additional benefit for children and parents. Besides learning the first steps on skis, children in the kindergarten can have fun with snow games with animators and sledding. The ski kindergarten is open to children aged 3-6.
ski_school.experience_desc: Access to the ski school is available to all persons over 5 years of age. Armed with years of experience, we recommend that you leave the choice of methods, form of work, terrain selection and everything else to your ski instructor whose knowledge and experience will lead you along the ideal path (slope) to your desired goal.
ski_school.quick_pricing_desc: Complete ski pass and equipment prices
ski_school.cta_subtitle: Book a skiing course for yourself or your children

sports.title: Sports Preparation
sports.hero_desc: Ideal conditions for altitude training at 1,200m above sea level
sports.conditions_desc: Ideal atmospheric conditions, mountain air rich in oxygen further enriched by dense forest, a large fitness center and an indoor pool have been part of our offer from the start. The novelty is a large football field next to the hotel with daily maintained grass (even in winter), enabling football teams to work with the ball during fitness preparations.
sports.clubs_subtitle: Just some of the eminent names that gained strength and fitness in Kupres
sports.contracts_heading: Signed contracts for construction of sports fields at Čajuša
sports.contracts_p1: In the Kupres municipality building (17.05.2017.) contracts were signed for the construction of sports fields at Čajuša worth 102,000 KM (71,000.00 KM land compensation and 31,000.00 KM for land conversion) while the entire investment will ultimately amount to about 10 million KM. The contracts were signed by municipal mayor Mr. Milan Raštegorac Komo and director/owner of SRC "Ćajuša" Mr. Zvonko Bagarić.
sports.contracts_p2: After signing the contracts, a press conference followed where the signatories presented more detailed information about this project of building sports fields in Kupres to journalists and the public.
sports.contracts_p3: The municipal mayor, Mr. Raštegorac, stated on that occasion that the goal of this project is to improve competitiveness and quality in providing services to professional sports clubs and to improve the tourism offer, and the ultimate result and goal is to stop emigration through employment in this new sports complex. All mayors of the Kupres municipality worked continuously on this sports-recreation center project and this is the result of years of work. All property-legal disputes and administrative obstacles have been resolved, the resolution of which took 6-7 years, and construction work on the fields can begin.
sports.contracts_p4: The director of ŠRC Adria Ski at Čajuša, Mr. Bagarić, expressed satisfaction and readiness to begin construction of 2-3 fields within a month, which should be completed in 2018. After years of resolving property-legal relations (6-7 years), everything is ready for the construction of a sports-recreation center in Kupres with 6 large football fields as well as tennis, handball and other sports courts at the level of world football fields for altitude preparation of professional clubs.
sports.contracts_p5: It is anticipated that the entire project of constructing all fields with complete infrastructure and facilities will cost approximately 10 million KM and will take at least 4-5 years. In the first phase, 4-5 people are planned to be employed and within a month we start construction of 3 football fields. The investment justification is very low with a long-term return on investment but very important for sustainable tourism in Kupres. Building these fields will allow us to have 10 clubs with 300 players doing altitude preparations at 1200m above sea level in Kupres at one time, as currently with one field we lose other clubs who had to do preparations elsewhere due to the field being occupied, and their construction will allow us to utilize accommodation capacities in summer as well.
sports.cta_subtitle: Contact us for organizing altitude training in Kupres

seminars_page.title: Seminars
seminars_page.hero_desc: Professional organization of seminars and thematic meetings
seminars_page.small_hall_desc: One of the segments of our business that we are proud of and develop and raise to a higher level every day is the organization of all types of seminars and thematic meetings. For meetings of up to 60 people, the small hall located right next to the restaurant on the ground floor of the hotel is ideal. Since the tables are not fixed, it is possible to organize a lecture or panel discussion depending on the client's needs.
seminars_page.large_hall_desc: For larger meetings, the hall on the basement level of the hotel is ideal. With a seating capacity of up to 250 people, a multipurpose chair arrangement and a shape that allows the formation of separate working groups, it fully meets the conditions for multi-day seminars or meetings. The hall is fully equipped with audio and video technology, and includes a bar for quick refreshments.
seminars_page.cta_subtitle: Contact us for organizing your business event

cycling.title: Mountain Biking
cycling.hero_desc: 5 cycling tours through beautiful Kupres landscapes
cycling.day1_desc: Arrival at Hotel "Adriaski" in the afternoon. Welcome dinner buffet-style with homemade specialties. For evening entertainment (depending on arrangement) guests will have the choice of: folk performance by local groups, accordion music or live music.
cycling.day2_tours: Cycling tours – 5 different tours according to interest and physical abilities
cycling.day2_dinner: Dinner – healthy homemade food, possibility of active guest participation in dinner preparation at restaurant "Ognjišta"
cycling.transport_desc: Program does not include: Transport (organized on request).
cycling.transport_note: Note: guests can bring their own bikes or rent them at the hotel as part of the package.
cycling.cta_subtitle: Book a cycling package and explore Kupres

hiking.title: Hiking
hiking.hero_desc: Exploratory hiking for beginners with the possibility of choosing a route and resting at beautiful spots with stunning views
hiking.day1_desc: Arrival at Hotel "Adriaski" in the afternoon. Welcome dinner buffet-style with homemade specialties. For evening entertainment (depending on arrangement) guests will have the choice of: folk performance by local groups, accordion music or live music.
hiking.day2_options: Three hiking options according to interest and physical abilities
hiking.day2_dinner: Dinner – healthy homemade food, possibility of active guest participation in dinner preparation at restaurant "Ognjišta".
hiking.transport_desc: Program does not include: Transport (organized on request).
hiking.cta_subtitle: Book a hiking package and explore the peaks of Kupres

lake.title: Rama Lake
lake.hero_desc: One of the most beautiful lakes in Europe, surrounded by steep mountain ranges
lake.about_p1: Rama Lake is located in the upper Rama valley in northern Herzegovina, in the area of today's municipality of Prozor-Rama. It is surrounded by the steep mountain ranges of Raduša, Makljen, Ljubuša and Vran. Although it was created as a result of the flooding of the Rama river bed in 1968, the sight of Rama Lake seems surreal and ranks it among the most beautiful lakes in Europe.
lake.about_p2: Its maximum length is 12 kilometers, area about 1500 hectares, greatest depth about 95 meters, while water oscillations reach up to 55 meters.
lake.beauty_desc: The special, surreal beauty of Rama Lake is provided by islands and peninsulas, among which the most famous is the Šćit peninsula, where the Franciscan Monastery Rama-Šćit is located. The Franciscans, who have been active in Bosnia since the late 13th century, most likely built the monastery in Rama in the 15th century, before the arrival of the Turks. Road access to Rama Lake exists from Prozor via paved road, and from Tomislavgrad, Livno and Split via a new paved route opened to traffic in 2006, and from Posušje the lake is reached via Blidinje, Kedžara and Orašac, areas that are also worth seeing.
lake.cta_heading: Discover the Beauty of Rama Lake
lake.cta_subtitle: Book an excursion and experience one of the most beautiful lakes in Europe

horseback.title: Horseback Riding
horseback.hero_desc: Marked riding trails through beautiful Kupres landscapes
horseback.day1_desc: Arrival at Hotel "Adriaski" in the afternoon. Welcome dinner buffet-style with homemade specialties. For evening entertainment (depending on arrangement) guests will have the choice of: accordion music, karaoke show or live music.
horseback.day2_ranch_note: TRIP TO THE RIDING RANCH AT ĆEVIĆI WHERE GUESTS WILL AGREE WITH THE GUIDE ON THE RIDING ROUTE FOR THAT DAY:
horseback.price_desc: PRICE INCLUDES: 2 full boards; guides are provided for all listed activities
horseback.additional_desc: IF GUESTS STAY 3 NIGHTS, ON THE THIRD DAY GUESTS WILL GO EITHER FISHING OR CAMPING IN NATURE – DEPENDING ON ARRANGEMENT, THEY WILL HAVE LUNCH AND/OR DINNER IN NATURE, AND IN THE EVENING IF THEY DON'T GO CAMPING THEY WILL HAVE DINNER AND ENTERTAINMENT AT HOTEL "ADRIA SKI" WITH LIVE MUSIC OR ACCORDION.
horseback.trails_desc: We have adapted and marked a number of riding trails that differ in length (25 km – 30 km) and altitude difference (1200 m – 1800 m). They also differ in difficulty level in terms of vegetation density and forest through which you ride and the need to jump obstacles or navigate through forest barriers. By combining different local riding trails you can also ride for several hours without passing through the same landscapes, and you will always be close to the ranch.
horseback.riders_desc: Also if you just want to feel the pleasure of terrain riding and make a new cool profile picture, there are short riding tours in nature lasting only about 20 minutes. For all types of riders eager for a new experience, we have something to offer. Of course, for those who don't want to ride, the tours are also suitable for walking in nature.
horseback.cta_subtitle: Book a riding package and explore Kupres on horseback

enduro.title: Enduro Tourism
enduro.hero_desc: Motorcycle adventures through wild forests and mountain trails of Kupres
enduro.adventure_desc: For riders it is a great adventure and challenge – climbing to 2,000 meters above sea level. They are not used to this in their regions, nor do they have the opportunity. Enduro tours, i.e., motorcycle rides on open terrain, in wild forests, on mountain stone roads and muddy trails.
enduro.riders_desc: On an enduro motorcycle everyone is equal, they pull and push each other's motorcycles when stuck in mud, sweat equally due to equipment, fear and adrenaline, and in the end together enjoy the view after a strenuous ride.
enduro.day1_desc: Arrival at Hotel "Adriaski" in the afternoon. Welcome dinner buffet-style with homemade specialties. For evening entertainment (depending on arrangement) guests will have the choice of: accordion music, karaoke show or live music.
enduro.day2_desc: Motorcycle rides – different tours according to interest and physical abilities. Motorcyclists' skills will be previously tested on a polygon adapted to motorcycle riding.
enduro.included_desc: Offer includes: STAY ON THE BASIS OF TWO NIGHTS: 2 full boards (lunch in nature included in the price);
enduro.additional_desc: IF GUESTS STAY 3 NIGHTS – 4 DAYS, ON THE THIRD DAY GUESTS WILL GO EITHER HORSEBACK RIDING, FISHING OR CAMPING IN NATURE – DEPENDING ON ARRANGEMENT, THEY WILL HAVE LUNCH AND/OR DINNER IN NATURE, AND IN THE EVENING IF THEY DON'T GO CAMPING THEY WILL HAVE DINNER AND ENTERTAINMENT AT HOTEL "ADRIA SKI" WITH LIVE MUSIC OR ACCORDION
enduro.cta_subtitle: Book an enduro package and explore the mountain trails of Kupres
